description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a simple, boxy structure and a hip roof. The front facade features a main entry door with a window panel and three large rectangular windows, two on the upper floor and one on the lower. The house has an attached side extension with a lower roof, which includes a single window. The rear and side elevations are plain, with minimal window openings, emphasizing a functional and modern design. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color with dark window and door frames, giving it a clean, contemporary appearance. The overall form and window arrangement suggest a practical urban dwelling suited for a suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, large rectangular windows, and a side extension, finished in light colors with dark trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, three large windows, and the attached side extension.
description_view_1: Rear view with a plain wall and a single window on the side extension.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the side extension and a single upper-story window.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two tall, narrow windows stacked vertically.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door featuring a window panel, no porch or steps, minimalistic modern trim
